title: Authors and Citation
text: Barisano G (2026). ggsegLobes: Lobar Parcellation Atlas 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem. R package version 0.0.1, https://github.com/gbarisano/ggsegLobes.
code: @Manual{,   title = {ggsegLobes: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem},   author = {Giuseppe Barisano},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://github.com/gbarisano/ggsegLobes}, }

what: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Lobar cortical parcellation ggseg ecosystem. ggsegLobes provides lobar parcellation (frontal, parietal, temporal, occipital, insula, per hemisphere) derived Desikan-Killiany atlas (ggseg::dk()) dissolving cortical regions lobes.

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: # with pak (recommended) # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("gbarisano/ggsegLobes")  # or with remotes # remotes::install_github("gbarisano/ggsegLobes")

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: library(ggseg) library(ggsegLobes) library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_brain(atlas = dklobes(), aes(fill = label), show.legend = TRUE,color = "black",linewidth = 0.8) +   scale_fill_manual(values = dklobes()$palette, na.value = "grey") +   theme_void() ggseg.formats::atlas_regions(dklobes()) #> [1] "frontal"   "insula"    "occipital" "parietal"  "temporal"

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: # install.packages("ggseg3d", #   repos = c("https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org")) library(ggseg3d)  ggseg3d(atlas = dklobes()) |>   pan_camera("left lateral")

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Derived Desikan-Killiany cortical regions: Frontal: superior/middle/inferior frontal, precentral, orbitofrontal, frontal pole, paracentral, anterior + posterior cingulate Parietal: superior/inferior parietal, postcentral, precuneus, supramarginal, isthmus cingulate Temporal: superior/middle/inferior temporal, fusiform, entorhinal, parahippocampal, temporal pole, transverse temporal, banks STS Occipital: lateral occipital, cuneus, lingual, pericalcarine Insula

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Desikan RS, et al. (2006). automated labeling system subdividing human cerebral cortex MRI scans gyral based regions interest. NeuroImage, 31(3):968-980. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2006.01.021

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas — dklobes
text: Cortical lobar parcellation (frontal, parietal, temporal, occipital, insula, per hemisphere) derived Desikan-Killiany atlas (ggseg::dk()) dissolving cortical regions lobes. Provides 2D polygon geometry use ggseg::geom_brain().

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas — dklobes
text: Desikan RS, et al. (2006). automated labeling system subdividing human cerebral cortex MRI scans gyral based regions interest. NeuroImage, 31(3):968-980. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2006.01.021

title: Lobar Parcellation Atlas — dklobes
code: dklobes() #>  #> ── dklobes ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 5 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>     hemi    region           label      lobe #> 1   left   frontal    left frontal   frontal #> 2   left    insula     left insula    insula #> 3   left occipital  left occipital occipital #> 4   left  parietal   left parietal  parietal #> 5   left  temporal   left temporal  temporal #> 6  right   frontal   right frontal   frontal #> 7  right    insula    right insula    insula #> 8  right occipital right occipital occipital #> 9  right  parietal  right parietal  parietal #> 10 right  temporal  right temporal  temporal if (FALSE) plot(dklobes()) # \dontrun{}

what: ggsegLobes: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegLobes-package
title: ggsegLobes: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegLobes-package
text: Lobar cortical parcellation (frontal, parietal, temporal, occipital, insula, per hemisphere) derived Desikan-Killiany atlas dissolving cortical regions lobes. Provided 'ggseg_atlas' object use 'ggseg'.

title: ggsegLobes: Lobar Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegLobes-package
